examples.title: Basic Copy Constructor Syntax
examples.description: Demonstrates declaration and implementation of copy constructor
examples.explanation: Shows proper copy constructor signature with const reference parameter and deep copy implementation for pointer member.

examples.title: Deep Copy with Initializer List
examples.description: Efficient copy constructor using initializer list
examples.explanation: Initializer list provides efficient initialization. Deep copy allocates new memory and copies content.

examples.title: Copy Constructor Call Scenarios
examples.description: Demonstrates all three scenarios where copy constructor is invoked
examples.explanation: Demonstrates three main cases: initialization, pass-by-value to function, and return-by-value from function.

examples.title: Preventing Copy with = delete
examples.explanation: C++11 introduced = delete syntax to explicitly disallow copy operations, causing compilation error on attempted use.

examples.title: Rule of Three Implementation
examples.description: Complete example showing all three functions of Rule of Three
examples.explanation: Complete implementation of Rule of Three showing destructor, copy constructor, and copy assignment operator for proper resource management.
